gaps.problem: Baseline full run skipped the pilot approval gate and event rows are not fully compliant with the planning schema.
gaps.task: lock schema migration, source hash validation, pilot scope, checkpoint/resume and disjoint output directories before any full remediation.
gaps.done_when: machine approval remains full_execution=false until pilot_review_decision=approved and all preflight checks pass.

gaps.source: baseline ASR events and raw ASR evidence
gaps.task: classify each ASR segment as host speech, song/background/platform/other speaker/noise; flag usable host speech.
gaps.done_when: all ASR-derived speaker events have classification fields and non-host audio is excluded from course/rule generation.

gaps.problem: Timeline is still dominated by ASR sentence rows rather than semantic live events.
gaps.task: merge/split events around topic switches, comment appearances, replies, course segments, sales nodes and anomalies.
gaps.done_when: each semantic event has source event ids, start/end, event_type, trigger and review status.

gaps.problem: Sparse visual sampling is the only visual evidence; base_scan_60s_estimated_windows=663, dense20_estimated_windows=1982.
gaps.task: use Alibaba Qwen-VL for 60s base scan and dense scans on comment/action/transition windows.
gaps.done_when: all sessions have base scan coverage and dense scan task records; uncovered spans are explicitly not_observable/source_limit.

gaps.source: local runtime api_raw and vision_clips inventory
gaps.problem: latest_live_07 has a visual clip without a matching non-AppleDouble API raw response.
gaps.task: backfill or explicitly invalidate the missing latest_live_07 visual raw response before downstream use.
gaps.done_when: vision_clips and api_raw counts match for every evidence-bearing window, or missing windows are excluded with reason.

gaps.source: Qwen-VL sparse windows and comment event rows
gaps.problem: Comment events do not track lifecycle, dedup group, first/last seen or final state.
gaps.task: track redacted comments across frames, distinguish username/body/system message, and store lifecycle fields.
gaps.done_when: each observable comment has stable redacted id, first_seen_ms, last_seen_ms, dedup_key, intent, risk, final_state.

gaps.problem: Candidate rows do not prove direct response, merged response, prompted comment, topic-only, unanswered or insufficient evidence.
gaps.task: arbitrate high-value relations using comment lifecycle, ASR semantic events and visual windows.
gaps.done_when: each high-value relation has response_link_type, evidence spans, alternatives, confidence and review outcome.

gaps.task: extract observable actions from dense Qwen-VL windows and mark not_observable where needed.
gaps.done_when: key events have action fields or explicit not_observable with evidence_ref and confidence.

gaps.problem: Text-derived prosody labels exist but pause_before/volume/emphasis evidence is not measured.
gaps.task: derive speech rate, pause before/after and emphasis from ASR timestamps/audio metadata; keep confidence.
gaps.done_when: usable host speech events include measured/derived prosody features and confidence.

gaps.source: 07 course candidates and course bridge files
gaps.problem: All rows are topic_similarity_only; full raw source refs are partly historical previous_pack refs.
gaps.task: remove false matches, allow no_match, use available bridge/source_quote refs, and mark exact alignment blocked where source is missing.

gaps.problem: Rules are template-like and not bound to event_id/trigger evidence/action/prosody basis.
gaps.task: regenerate rules only after reply/course/action/prosody validation.
gaps.done_when: each rule binds event ids, trigger evidence, user state, strategy, course/action/prosody basis and risk.

gaps.problem: Queue is fixed at 80 per session instead of post-arbitration risk ranking.
gaps.task: rebuild queue after agent arbitration with evidence, alternatives and review action.
gaps.done_when: final queue contains only unresolved high-risk or low-confidence items ranked by priority.
